content.problemStatement:
Complete the code for Binary Search to find the index of an element $K$ in the given array $A$.
Output the index of the element of $K$, if $K$ is present in $A$, else output $-1$.
content.inputFormat: - The first and only line of input contains a single string $S$.
content.outputFormat: - Output the length of the longest substring with no repeating characters.

sampleTestCases.explanation: $2$ does not exist in this array
